data.name: Deepest Massage
data.detailed_description:
Gameplay

Your cursor is your hand. Gently move the cursor to brush sensitive areas like the inner thighs, breasts, and between the inner thighs. Click and hold to massage all these body parts and more.

Massaging sore muscles will earn Trust Points, which can be spent on powerful tools and items, or to unlock unique sexual actions and cosmetics. Higher states of Arousal and orgasms will provide a LOT of Trust Points.

Sensitive parts of the body will produce Fear if Arousal is too low, and your client will need to be massaged in order to build Trust and increase their Arousal. At full fear, all Arousal is erased.

If Fear is too high, the client cannot be given the Deepest Massage™.

Progression

This game is designed to mimic the intricate challenges of seduction. In-game items can powerfully change the mood of your client. However, the player is always rewarded for looking closely, and patiently convincing the client to let herself feel good.

As you gain her trust, you will unlock future sessions where your client is open to trying progressively more perverse acts.

Story

A shy and voluptuous woman is your new client. 

Guide your client through many states of emotion. From a timid contained lust, to the deepest throes of pleasure, or if you are not careful, fear of a man who is too eager.

Customization

Collect lots of different clothes, accessories and tools. Mix and match different outfits, and customize skin color and pubic hair level.

data.short_description: This lady dynamically responds to your touch! Extremely realistic animations blend so smoothly that she feels real. Extensive sound design for every noise and breath gives an almost ASMR-like experience.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions, x86_64 CPU, ARMv8 CPU Example: Intel Core 2 Duo E8200, AMD Athlon XE BE-2300, Snapdragon X Elite
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0 support Example: Intel HD Graphics 5500 (Broadwell), AMD Radeon R5 Graphics (Kaveri)
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (Compatibility) or macOS 10.15 (Forward+/Mobile)
  • 處理器: x86_64 or ARM CPU (Apple Silicon) Example: Intel Core 2 Duo SU9400, Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0 support Example: Intel HD Graphics 5500 (Broadwell), AMD Radeon R5 Graphics (Kaveri)
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux distribution released after 2016
  • 處理器: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions, x86_64 CPU, ARMv7 or ARMv8 CPU Example: Intel Core 2 Duo E8200, AMD Athlon XE BE-2300, Raspberry Pi 4
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0 support Example: Intel HD Graphics 5500 (Broadwell), AMD Radeon R5 Graphics (Kaveri)
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
